title: pelargonium sabulosum
intro: Pelargonium sabulosum, also known as the sandy-leaved geranium or hard-leaved pelargonium, is a succulent plant species in the family Geraniaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues, fever, and skin problems, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium sabulosum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Pelargonium sabulosum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
